productDisplayName: ADIDAS Men Plugged In Yellow Flip Flops
description: Plug into style with the Plugged In flip flop from adidas. Created for the carefree and offering exemplary comfort and style, this flip flop makes for a perfect casual wear. Upper Textured rubber straps in a thong style, with a toe separator PU footbed for cushioned comfort Printed footbed for style Outsole TPR outsole with geametrical lugs for maximum traction shoe care Wipe off dirt with a moist cloth Do not store in direct sunlight
